calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-28-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor. Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; CSR: M. Baldocchi #5207.

Petitioners Margaret J. Grisz-Dow and Duncan Dow (mother & father) were present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for and with the minor Isabel louis Pollard Dow.
Petitioners were placed under oath and examined.

Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to Isabel Jean Star Pollard Gryszkiewicz Dow.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
